terminal_commands.name: VibeCoding Runner: session8-smoke-project
terminal_commands.text:
RUNNER_LOG_PATH='/Users/beckliu/Documents/0agentproject2026/vibecodingworkflow/integrations/vibecoding-vscode-extension/fixtures/session8-smoke-project/.vibecoding/runner.log' RUNNER_CMD=''"'"'python3'"'"' '"'"'/Users/beckliu/Documents/0agentproject2026/vibecodingworkflow/scripts/run-vibecoding-loop.py'"'"' '"'"'/Users/beckliu/Documents/0agentproject2026/vibecodingworkflow/integrations/vibecoding-vscode-extension/fixtures/session8-smoke-project'"'"' '"'"'--action'"'"' '"'"'run'"'"' '"'"'--runner-cmd'"'"' '"'"'python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; Path(r'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'/Users/beckliu/Documents/0agentproject2026/vibecodingworkflow/integrations/vibecoding-vscode-extension/fixtures/session8-smoke-project/outputs/session-logs/runner-smoke.txt'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"').write_text('"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"' {next_session}|{next_prompt}
 '"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"', encoding='"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'utf-8'"'"'"'"'"'"'"'"')"'"'"'' /bin/bash -lc 'mkdir -p "$(dirname "$RUNNER_LOG_PATH")"; printf "
===== [%s] Runner start =====
" "$(date '"'"'+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'"'"')" >> "$RUNNER_LOG_PATH"; stdin_tty=no; stdout_tty=no; stderr_tty=no; if [ -t 0 ]; then stdin_tty=yes; fi; if [ -t 1 ]; then stdout_tty=yes; fi; if [ -t 2 ]; then stderr_tty=yes; fi; runner_term="${TERM:-}"; if [ -z "$runner_term" ] || [ "$runner_term" = "dumb" ]; then runner_term="xterm-256color"; fi; printf "Runner env: stdin_tty=%s stdout_tty=%s stderr_tty=%s TERM=%s
" "$stdin_tty" "$stdout_tty" "$stderr_tty" "$runner_term" >> "$RUNNER_LOG_PATH"; if [ "$stdin_tty" = "yes" ] && [ "$stdout_tty" = "yes" ] && [ "$stderr_tty" = "yes" ]; then TERM="$runner_term" script -aqF "$RUNNER_LOG_PATH" /bin/bash -lc "$RUNNER_CMD" 2>>"$RUNNER_LOG_PATH"; status=$?; else set -o pipefail; eval "$RUNNER_CMD" 2>&1 | tee -a "$RUNNER_LOG_PATH"; status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}; fi; printf "===== [%s] Runner end (exit=%s) =====
" "$(date '"'"'+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'"'"')" "$status" >> "$RUNNER_LOG_PATH"; exit "$status"'
